name: RIVAL BAND — Dion Burns
description:
【 Old bandmate, new rival 】➠ Nobody knew that an argument about artistic differences would end up with Dion making his own band out of pure spite just to be better than yours—better than you. And nobody expected him to get as famous as he is.

That being said, your band is still slightly more popular than his, and maybe that's why the both of you got invited to the same festival—an unpleasant surprise for Dion, since he hasn't seen you in two years—but whatever, he'll get to that stage and show you just how much better he is.

...Though he might also intentionally bump into you backstage to tease you a bit, maybe taunt you, perhaps to get on your nerves for a while.

╭──────────𖦹.🪦⊹ ࣪ ˖ 𖦹─╮

And I know just what to do

And ya know I'll do it too

Then I'm coming back for you

Back for you!

╰─𖦹 ˖ ࣪ ⊹🪦.𖦹──────────╯

Killing is my business... and business is good! — Megadeth

▶• ılıılıılılıılıılı. 03:06

【 Contents and CWs 】➠ anypov, 1985 setting, metalhead bot, singer user, possible toxic relationship dynamics (he's an asshole), as always check the sexual info section to avoid any triggers

If you think this is inspired by any real life events let me tell you it's not and you're wrong (gaslighting)

Listen... Sometimes a guy gets inspired by irl band drama cuz how wouldn't I have you seen the amounts of shit that has and goes down on the metal scene

Anyway ive been listening to a lottt more megadeth lately (probably cuz they feel very summer-like to me lolz) so expect the next few bots to be inspired by some of their songs (i reallyyy want to make one based on Trust cuz... ofc i do, im still thinking about the plot but the idea is there hehe)

Also I've left user's band name as blank so yall can choose one! It's written to also be a thrash metal band but yall can make it whatever you want it to be, have fun! Just make sure to write down all the details in the chat memory :p

And one last thing, since janitor now gives the option of the character name and the display name being two separate things I thought about writing the display name as if they were song titles and the artists are the characters so like "song name — artist name" :3 just a fun little thing idk i like yapping!!!
creator: lookillo
